modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Duo after replacing my Android phone.

full_description_text: I replaced my phone and now I can't access Duo. I can't read my email or get to the online bookstore because of this issue. My new Android device is not letting me use Duo.
short_description: Unable to access Duo after replacing my Android phone.
description: I replaced my phone and now I can't access Duo. I can't read my email or get to the online bookstore because of this issue. My new Android device is not letting me use Duo.
